M-082.NAME: manual-external-mtproto-proxy-pool
M-082.owns: Admin-managed external MTProto proxy pool, delivery-mode selection, owner-facing manual proxy payloads, secret redaction, and operator audit boundaries.
M-082.purpose: Allow the administrator to manually publish a verified external MTProto proxy to user cabinets when the automatic KrotPN MTProto edge is blocked by provider/DPI conditions.

exports.model-MTProtoManualExternalProxy: Persistent external proxy row with name, server, port, encrypted secret, status, priority, verification notes, and audit metadata.
exports.model-MTProtoDeliverySettings: Singleton delivery-mode state selecting automatic KrotPN issuance or manual external proxy delivery.
exports.fn-list-manual-mtproto-proxies: Return redacted admin summaries for the manual proxy pool.
exports.fn-create-manual-mtproto-proxy: Validate and store an external MTProto proxy with encrypted secret material.
exports.fn-activate-manual-mtproto-proxy: Make one verified external proxy active for manual delivery after explicit admin confirmation.
exports.fn-update-mtproto-delivery-mode: Switch between automatic and manual_external delivery modes with audit logging.
exports.fn-select-owner-mtproto-payload: Return either the existing automatic KrotPN assignment payload or the active manual external proxy payload for the authenticated owner.
exports.fn-redact-manual-proxy-secret: Mask external proxy secret and generated links in admin lists, logs, and audit records.

delivery-policy.policy-1: automatic mode preserves the current M-043/M-045 issue_user_proxy behavior and must not reissue or rotate existing KrotPN MTProto assignments.
delivery-policy.policy-2: manual_external mode returns the active external proxy configured by the administrator and bypasses automatic runtime provisioning for owner display only.
delivery-policy.policy-3: If manual_external mode has no active proxy, the owner endpoint must return a safe pending/degraded message instead of an empty or malformed Telegram link.
delivery-policy.policy-4: External manual proxies do not provide KrotPN runtime telemetry, IP history, abuse analytics, active connection counts, or promotion-tag apply control unless a future explicit integration adds it.

security-contract.rule-1: External proxy secrets are encrypted at rest and never logged in plaintext.
security-contract.rule-2: Admin list/detail responses redact secrets and full Telegram links; replacing a secret is allowed, revealing it through admin list APIs is not.
security-contract.rule-3: User owner response may include the full secret/link because the authenticated owner needs the proxy credentials.
security-contract.rule-4: Every create, update, activate, disable, and mode-switch action writes an audit-safe M-026 event.

constraints.constraint-1: Phase-80 must not change install.sh, deploy scripts, nginx, docker-compose, AWG/VPN runtime, KPprotoN runtime, SNI router topology, or Telegram upstream routing.
constraints.constraint-2: Manual external delivery must be operator-controlled; no automatic failover decision may claim provider-level Telegram availability without live proof.
constraints.constraint-3: Frontend UI must be compact and clear that external manual proxy analytics are unavailable.
constraints.constraint-4: Promotion tag controls in M-059 remain scoped to the KrotPN-managed runtime and must not pretend to configure third-party external proxies.

verification-readiness.ready-1: V-M-082 passed locally with backend service/API tests, user/admin UI smoke, redaction checks, telemetry honesty checks, and protected deploy/runtime guards.
verification-readiness.ready-2: Targeted backend tests plus frontend/admin builds passed because Phase-80 changes schema, admin API, owner response shape, and both frontends.

evidence.evidence-1: 2026-06-07: backend MTProto manual pool/API/admin regression tests passed 14/14.
evidence.evidence-2: 2026-06-07: frontend and frontend-admin production builds passed.
evidence.evidence-3: 2026-06-07: Phase-80 smoke, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected deploy/runtime guard passed.

M-082.hotspot: H-069: Manual external MTProto proxies are outside the KrotPN runtime, so delivery must be explicit, redacted, operator-controlled, and honest about missing telemetry.
